Name: 40A Brushless(Brand) ESC
Purpose: This is the ESC the thurster motor connects to this which connects to the F.C

Name: APC 8x4.5MRP Propeller
Purpose: This is the thurster propeller spare are added so that in cases of crashes during testing i have three lives.

Name: FLASH HOBBY D2830EVO 1000KV RC
Purpose: This is the thurster motor for the plane it is strong and efficentPdocusing about 1 kg of thurst with an 8 inch properller

Name: BN-880 GPS module
Purpose: This is a GPS module with compass module this is needed for auto nvaigation, calcuating cross wind, and other deviations caused by external factors

Name: Push Rods
Purpose: So the the servos can control the flaps in a manner that would fail when in flight. Best part is they also inculde control horn the part that attached to the servos roating end and the moving flap.

Name: Basic LiPo Balance Charger
Purpose: To charge the LIPO battery that will power all of the electronics. A crappy charger can set the house on fire.(this is the bare min.)

Name: OVONIC 4s Lipo Battery 35C 2200mAh 14.8V Lipo
Purpose: The purpose is to power all of the electronis on board

Name: MG90s
Purpose: These servos are the alienrons and rudder controls. They are on the pricy side but explained in second journal why i chose these

Name: RadioMaster RP1 V2 2.4ghz ExpressLRS ELRS Nano Receiver
Purpose: (Talks to the controller and plugs into the Flight Controller). To receive signals onboard form the controller

Name: RadioMaster T8L ExpressLRS
Purpose: This is the radio controller to send command to the plane via driver mode

Name: ATOMRC F405 NAVI MINI Fixed Wing Flight Controller
Purpose: THe flight controller plus inbuilt sensors

Name: Raspberry Pi 2 W
Purpose: The main compute unit for complex desicions
